message:
chore: Prepare for GitHub release

Changes:
- Update rich_rust from local path to crates.io (version 0.1)
- Replace fragmented CI workflows with unified ci.yml using nightly toolchain
- Add release.yml for cross-platform binary releases (Linux/macOS/Windows x86+ARM)
- Use Swatinem/rust-cache@v2 for better caching performance
- Add concurrency controls and proper permissions

CI workflow includes:
- Lint (rustfmt + clippy)
- Tests on ubuntu/macos/windows
- Security audit (cargo-audit)
- Coverage with codecov

Release workflow includes:
- Cross-platform matrix build (5 targets)
- SHA256 checksums for all artifacts
- Automatic GitHub Release creation
- Support for manual dispatch with tag input

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,103 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+  RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
+  RUSTFLAGS: "-D warnings"
+
+jobs:
+  lint:
+    name: Lint
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        with:
+          components: rustfmt, clippy
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+      - name: Check formatting
+        run: cargo fmt --all -- --check
+      - name: Run Clippy
+        run: cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
+
+  test:
+    name: Test (${{ matrix.os }})
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          key: ${{ matrix.os }}
+      - name: Run tests
+        run: cargo test --all-features --verbose
+      - name: Run doc tests
+        run: cargo test --doc
+
+  security:
+    name: Security Audit
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+      - name: Install cargo-audit
+        run: cargo install cargo-audit
+      - name: Run audit
+        run: cargo audit
+
+  coverage:
+    name: Coverage
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        with:
+          components: llvm-tools-preview
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+      - uses: taiki-e/install-action@cargo-llvm-cov
+      - name: Generate coverage
+        run: |
+          cargo llvm-cov --all-features --workspace \
+            --lcov --output-path lcov.info \
+            --ignore-filename-regex "(tests/|test_)"
+      - name: Upload to Codecov
+        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
+        with:
+          files: lcov.info
+          fail_ci_if_error: false
+          verbose: true
+
+  build:
+    name: Build Check
+    needs: [lint, test]
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+      - name: Build release
+        run: cargo build --release --all-features

-env:
-  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always

-  # Disable incremental compilation for CI (more reproducible builds)

-  integration:

-            --no-fail-fast \

-          RUST_LOG: debug
-          RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
-
-      - name: Run E2E tests
-        run: |
-          cargo nextest run \
-            --features test-utils \

-            --test-threads=2 \
-            --retries 1 \

-          NO_COLOR: 1

-          echo "### E2E Test Logs" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          if [ -f test-logs/e2e_tests.log ]; then
-            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-            tail -50 test-logs/e2e_tests.log >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

-        uses: actions/checkout@v4

-          RUST_BACKTRACE: 1

-  extended-integration:
-    name: Extended Integration Tests
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 60
-    if: github.event_name == 'schedule'
-
-    steps:
-      - name: Checkout code
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
-
-      - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
-        with:
-          components: llvm-tools-preview
-
-      - name: Cache cargo registry
-        uses: actions/cache@v4
-        with:
-          path: |
-            ~/.cargo/registry
-            ~/.cargo/git
-            target
-          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-extended-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
-          restore-keys: |
-            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-extended-
-            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-

-      - name: Install cargo-nextest and llvm-cov
-        uses: taiki-e/install-action@v2
-        with:
-          tool: nextest,cargo-llvm-cov

-      - name: Create test artifacts directory
-        run: mkdir -p test-logs/artifacts

-      - name: Run all integration tests with coverage
-        run: |

-            --all-features \
-            --lcov --output-path integration-lcov.info \
-            --test provider_render_pipeline_test \
-            --test schema_contract_test \
-            --test fixtures_test \
-            --test http_client_test \
-            --test e2e_usage_test \
-            --test e2e_cost_test \
-            --no-fail-fast \
-            --test-threads=4 \
-            2>&1 | tee test-logs/extended_integration.log
-        env:
-          RUST_LOG: debug
-          RUST_BACKTRACE: full
-
-      - name: Upload extended test artifacts
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
-        if: always()
-        with:
-          name: extended-integration-artifacts
-          path: |
-            test-logs/
-            integration-lcov.info
-          retention-days: 30
-
-      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
-        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
-        with:
-          files: integration-lcov.info
-          flags: integration
-          fail_ci_if_error: false
-          verbose: true

@@ -0,0 +1,123 @@
+name: Release
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags: ['v*']
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      tag:
+        description: 'Tag to release (e.g., v0.1.0)'
+        required: true
+
+concurrency:
+  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: false
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+
+jobs:
+  build:
+    name: Build ${{ matrix.target }}
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 45
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            artifact: caut
+            asset: caut-linux-amd64
+          - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
+            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            artifact: caut
+            asset: caut-linux-arm64
+          - os: macos-14
+            target: aarch64-apple-darwin
+            artifact: caut
+            asset: caut-darwin-arm64
+          - os: macos-13
+            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
+            artifact: caut
+            asset: caut-darwin-amd64
+          - os: windows-latest
+            target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
+            artifact: caut.exe
+            asset: caut-windows-amd64.exe
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        with:
+          targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          key: release-${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Build release binary
+        run: cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Create tarball (Unix)
+        if: runner.os != 'Windows'
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p dist
+          cd target/${{ matrix.target }}/release
+          tar -cJf ../../../dist/${{ matrix.asset }}.tar.xz ${{ matrix.artifact }}
+          cd ../../../dist
+          shasum -a 256 "${{ matrix.asset }}.tar.xz" > "${{ matrix.asset }}.tar.xz.sha256"
+
+      - name: Create zip (Windows)
+        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
+        shell: pwsh
+        run: |
+          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist
+          Compress-Archive -Path "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ matrix.artifact }}" -DestinationPath "dist/${{ matrix.asset }}.zip"
+          cd dist
+          $hash = (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 "${{ matrix.asset }}.zip").Hash.ToLower()
+          "$hash  ${{ matrix.asset }}.zip" | Out-File -Encoding ASCII "${{ matrix.asset }}.zip.sha256"
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ${{ matrix.asset }}
+          path: dist/*
+
+  release:
+    name: Create Release
+    needs: build
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      contents: write
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          path: dist
+          merge-multiple: true
+
+      - name: Extract version
+        id: version
+        run: |
+          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "workflow_dispatch" ]; then
+            echo "version=${{ github.event.inputs.tag }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          else
+            echo "version=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          fi
+
+      - name: List artifacts
+        run: ls -la dist/
+
+      - uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
+        with:
+          tag_name: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+          name: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+          generate_release_notes: true
+          files: dist/*
+          draft: false
+          prerelease: ${{ contains(steps.version.outputs.version, '-') }}
